evals.prompt: my mac is running low on storage, whats using all my space? can you help me figure out what to clean up
evals.expected_output: Should scan home directory (or check existing scan), show tree breakdown, identify large files and cleanup opportunities, present actionable recommendations

evals.prompt: find all the node_modules and target folders in ~/playground, I want to know how much space they're wasting
evals.expected_output: Should scan ~/playground if needed, run dev-artifacts query, list each artifact directory with size, suggest which ones to delete

evals.prompt: i need to free up at least 5GB on my disk. what can i safely delete without losing anything important?
evals.expected_output: Should analyze disk usage, identify safe-to-delete items (dev artifacts, old downloads, duplicates, caches), tally up potential savings, present a plan that adds up to >= 5GB
